race.name: Marathon des Belles Combes
race.tagline: Season-opening 42km freestyle marathon in the Jura Mountains — the first race of France's Marathon Ski Tour circuit kicks off the French Nordic calendar.

climate.description: The Jura Mountains receive reliable snowfall at this altitude, though the December date makes early-season conditions more variable.
challenges: Early season — snow conditions can be variable
Jura weather can be foggy and damp

course.primary: 42km freestyle marathon through the Jura Mountains around Les Moussieres. Rolling terrain through forest and high pastures.
features: Opens the Marathon Ski Tour season
Rolling terrain through forest and pastures
Part of the French national long-distance circuit

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Solid mid-tier French marathon that opens the national season, with good organization but limited international draw.

history.summary: The Marathon des Belles Combes opens the Marathon Ski Tour season each December in the Jura Mountains. It is the first race of France's national long-distance Nordic circuit.
notable_facts: Opens the Marathon Ski Tour season
Part of France's national long-distance circuit
Jura Mountain venue near La Transjurassienne region

youtube_data.search_query: Marathon des Belles Combes cross country ski race Les Moussieres

videos.title: TCS Lidingöloppet, Stockholm, Sweden, in 2021
videos.description: In 2021, on a beautiful sunny day in Stockholm, Sweden, 650 TCS employees and clients ran together in the TCS Lidingöloppet. What an inspirational weekend it was. Watch the video to hear about the experiences of those who took part and showed us how resilience and teamwork can get you through any challenge.
videos.transcript:
[Music]
it's such a beautiful sunny day here in
stockholm
and about 650 of our employees and
clients are running together with us
actually it's my 11th time here at tcs
leading in office it's really nice that
we are opening up the competitions like
we used to
[Applause]
tough race
and i've been here the whole day with my
family
spent some time here at the hospitality
tcs
if i would rate this race between
stockholm marathon and some of the
others that i've run i would say this is
the number one it's the best race
health and wellness is a
important part of our philosophy and our
culture
we so look forward to the coming years
when we can invite even more people to
this fantastic race
it's been a really fun
day a lot of energy a lot of positive
energy but i'm tired i must say i'm very
tired right now
you

videos.title: 2 PODIUMS EN 1 WEEK-END ?!? (Les Belles Combes 2023, Marathon Ski Tour)
videos.description:
Voici enfin ma vidéo sur le week-end des Belles, avec un 13km Skate et un 26km Classique où je vais essayer d'aller chercher deux podiums! 🔔 Un très bel événement dans le Jura entre deux week-ends de Coupe de France, ce qui me permettra de préparer la dernière, à Prémanon, toujours dans le Jura, à partir d'aujourd'hui 🇫🇷. 


Je vous donne rendez-vous mercredi prochain pour la vidéo sur le SNT de Prémanon qui aura lieu à partir de demain, avec deux belles courses à ma portée, et encore un week-end de course qui suivra à Prémanon! ✌️


Voici le lien de la vidéo des Belles Combes réalisée par MAM Prod, notamment avec ces belles images au drone: https://youtu.be/DX0G-P6IN9k

Merci à Nils Louna et à Emmanuel Perret pour les photos, ainsi qu'à Louis et Boris pour les vidéos des courses 🦾


Vous pouvez aussi toujours utiliser le code promo BASILE15 sur Hydrascore pour obtenir -15% vos barres et vos boissons isotoniques! https://www.hydrascore.fr/ 🍫🍼

🦾 Merci à mes partenaires:

🗞 YPMédias (http://www.ypmedias.com/)

🏔 Chamrousse (https://www.chamrousse.com/)

🎿 Atomic (https://www.atomic.com/fr-fr)

🥢 Swix (https://www.swixsport.com/fr)

🛼 R17 Rollerskis (https://r17.ski.fr/)

🍼 Hydrascore (https://www.hydrascore.fr/)

🕶 ODC Opticiens (https://www.odc-opticiens.com/)


En attendant la prochaine vidéo, venez me suivre sur Instagram pour suivre mon actualité: https://www.instagram.com/basilebunoz/Voici mon site internet Basile Bunoz Athlete: https://basilebunozathlete.webador.fr et vous pouvez me contacter l’adresse basile.bunoz@gmail.com#ski #xcski #xcskiing #racing #trail #trailrunning #sport #competition #skating #classic #rollerski #rollerskiing #cycling #cycle #vlog
videos.curation_reason: Recent 2023 skier vlog specifically covering both classic and skate races at Marathon des Belles Combes with podium pursuit narrative.
